actionUnits.condition: Simulate EventTrigger PointerClick (eventID=4; EventTrigger MonoBehaviour id=227892007, script guid=d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building5 PrefabInstance (fileID=227892003). This invokes Hotel.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour fileID=227892005 (script guid=f713beac870e2bd45bed25f1cda3a140). Expected behavior per code: showlabel() sets Player->child[1] TextMeshPro.text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20), where GetLabel() returns 'Hotel:Udon Hotel' for gameObject.name=='Building5'. Note: This string length (17) may cause ArgumentOutOfRangeException due to Substring(0,20) if not guarded; also requires a GameObject named 'Player' with a second child holding a TextMeshPro component.

Simulate EventTrigger PointerClick (eventID=4) on Building5 PrefabInstance (fileID=227892003). EventTrigger MonoBehaviour id=227892007 (script guid=d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has a persistent call to Hotel.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour id=227892005 (script guid=f713beac870e2bd45bed25f1cda3a140). Expected: showlabel() sets Player->child[1] TextMeshPro.text = GetLabel().Substring(0,20). For Building5, GetLabel() returns 'Hotel:Udon Hotel'. Note: May raise ArgumentOutOfRangeException if the string length is < 20 or NullReferenceException if Player child[1] lacks TextMeshPro.
